name: limitbar
description: Local-first CLI for glanceable AI agent limits, spend, and risky run status.

scripts.check: node --check bin/limitbar.js && find src test -name '*.js' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
scripts.smoke: node bin/limitbar.js status --config examples/limitbar.config.json --fixtures examples/fixtures --format text || test $? -eq 1
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
